actions.name: clear_tasks
actions.description: Clear every completed task from a Google Tasks task list.

tasklistId.description: Google Tasks task list ID. Use @default for the primary list when supported.

success.description: Whether the Google Tasks operation completed successfully.

actions.name: create_task_list
actions.description: Create a new Google Tasks task list.

title.description: Title for the new task list.

success.description: Whether the Google Tasks operation completed successfully.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Fetch a Google Tasks task by task list ID and task ID.

tasklistId.description: Google Tasks task list ID. Use @default for the primary list when supported.

anyOf.description: Entity tag for the task resource.
Task title.
Task notes.
Task status.
Parent task ID when this task is a subtask.
Lexicographic position token among sibling tasks.
Task due timestamp in RFC 3339 format.
Timestamp when the task was completed, in RFC 3339 format.

deleted.description: Whether the task is marked as deleted.

hidden.description: Whether the task is hidden from the default Google Tasks view.

anyOf.description: Last update time for the task, in RFC 3339 format.
API URL for the task resource.
Google Tasks web URL for the task.

link.description: Absolute URL or URI for the linked resource.

items.description: A link attached to a Google Task.

surfaceType.description: Type of surface where the task was assigned.

linkToTask.description: Absolute link to the source assignment surface.

spaceInfo.description: Google Chat space information for assigned tasks.

driveFileId.description: Google Drive file ID for the source document.

resourceKey.description: Google Drive resource key for the source document.

driveResourceInfo.description: Google Drive file information for assigned tasks.

anyOf.description: Assignment metadata returned for tasks created from Gmail, Docs, or Chat.

actions.name: list_all_tasks
actions.description: List tasks across every Google Tasks task list visible to the current connection.

dueMax.description: Only return tasks due on or before this timestamp.

dueMin.description: Only return tasks due on or after this timestamp.

completedMax.description: Only return tasks completed on or before this timestamp.

completedMin.description: Only return tasks completed on or after this timestamp.

updatedMin.description: Only return tasks updated on or after this timestamp.

showCompleted.description: Whether completed tasks should be returned.

showDeleted.description: Whether deleted tasks should be returned.

showHidden.description: Whether hidden tasks should be returned.

showAssigned.description: Whether assigned tasks should be returned.

maxTasksTotal.description: Maximum number of tasks to return across all task lists.

anyOf.description: Task list title.

taskCount.description: Number of tasks returned for this task list.

items.description: Summary information for a task list included in list_all_tasks.

taskLists.description: Task lists visited while aggregating tasks.

tasklistId.description: Task list ID that contains the task.

anyOf.description: Task list title that contains the task.

items.description: A normalized Google Tasks task with task list context.

tasks.description: Tasks returned across every visited task list.

totalLists.description: Number of task lists included in the aggregation.

totalTasks.description: Number of tasks returned by the aggregation.

truncated.description: Whether aggregation stopped early because maxTasksTotal was reached.

actions.name: list_task_lists
actions.description: List Google Tasks task lists visible to the current connection.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of task lists to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous Google Tasks response.

Task list title.

API URL for the task list resource.

items.description: A normalized Google Tasks task list.

taskLists.description: Task lists returned by Google Tasks.

anyOf.description: Opaque token for the next page, or null when there are no more results.
